questions.q: On April 24, 2026, a 75-year-old millionaire US big game hunter was reported to have been trampled to death in Central Africa by what animal?
Procter & Gamble reported a six percent increase in diluted net earnings per share on April 24, 2026, driven by a gain from the dissolution of which joint venture business?
In an internal memo reported on April 24, 2026, Xbox leadership admitted that players are frustrated and that their presence on which platform 'isn't strong enough'?
A proposed class action lawsuit filed in April 2026 accuses JetBlue Airways of utilizing what controversial method to set its ticket prices?
The federal government approved Enbridge's $4-billion 'Sunrise' natural gas pipeline expansion project on April 24, 2026. In which province is this project located?
Reported on April 24, 2026, scientists analyzing trapped air in ancient Antarctic ice have uncovered a surprising new chapter in Earth's climate story stretching back how many years?
According to an April 2026 Florida Fish and Wildlife report, how many sloths died at a warehouse connected to the upcoming Sloth World Orlando attraction?

The randomized controlled PERTH Trial, discussed in an April 24, 2026, report, showed that a low-plastic diet can significantly reduce urinary levels of plastic-associated bisphenols and what other chemicals?
Which European country reached a deal with STACKIT on April 24, 2026, to decrease its reliance on U.S. tech companies?
Which luxury automaker admitted on April 24, 2026, that its Middle East deliveries are at a 'complete standstill' due to regional geopolitical disruptions affecting shipping routes?
